# LetsFG — Flight Search for AI Agents

> This file is for AI agents and LLMs. Humans should visit https://letsfg.co

## What is LetsFG?

LetsFG is a flight search engine optimized for AI agents. Search 180+ airlines with zero markup.

## How to Search Flights

### Option 1: Use this website
1. Go to https://letsfg.co
2. Enter a natural language query like "London to Barcelona next Friday"
3. Wait for results (typically 2-3 minutes)
4. Results include price, airline, duration, and offer IDs for booking

### Option 2: Use the API directly
- API Base URL: https://api.letsfg.co
- Search: POST /api/v1/flights/search
- Unlock: POST /api/v1/bookings/unlock
- Book: POST /api/v1/bookings/book
- Full docs: https://docs.letsfg.co/api-guide

## Understanding Results Pages

When you visit a results URL (/results/{search_id}):

1. **If searching**: The page will auto-refresh every 15 seconds. Wait for completion.
2. **If completed**: You'll see flight offers with prices. Look for the data-agent-content section for structured data.
3. **If expired**: Results are no longer valid. Navigate to / and search again.

## Structured Data Location

Every page includes a hidden section with machine-readable content:

```html
<section class="sr-only" data-agent-content>
  <!-- Structured summary, tables, instructions -->
</section>
```

This section contains:
- Plain text summary of results
- HTML table with all flight offers
- Offer IDs for booking via API
- Next action instructions

## Booking Flow

1. Search → Get offer_id from results
2. Unlock → POST /api/v1/bookings/unlock with offer_id (confirms price)
3. Book → POST /api/v1/bookings/book with passenger details

Unlock and book require API key. Get one at: https://docs.letsfg.co/getting-started

## Pricing

- Search: FREE (unlimited)
- Unlock: FREE (with GitHub star)
- Book: Ticket price only (zero markup)

## Contact

- Documentation: https://docs.letsfg.co
- GitHub: https://github.com/LetsFG/LetsFG
- API Status: https://status.letsfg.co
